name: workframe
description: Adaptive local entrypoint for Workframe runtimes and model providers.

scripts.check: node --check bin/workframe.js && for f in lib/*.js test/*.test.js; do node --check "$f"; done
scripts.test: npm run check && node --test test/*.test.js && node bin/workframe.js --version && node bin/workframe.js status --json > /dev/null
